summary: The user is developing a 10-minute comedy set and seeks assistance with joke writing and structure. They recently attended a comedy writing workshop that enhanced their understanding of humor, particularly in observational comedy related to online dating and their job as a software engineer, including the use of jargon in the tech industry.
facts: The user is working on a 10-minute comedy set.
The user recently took a comedy writing workshop at a local comedy club.
The user is interested in writing observational humor.
The user has noticed peculiarities in online dating, such as people using old photos.
The user is a software engineer.
The user has caught themselves using jargon like "synergy" and "disrupt" in meetings.
The user has been thinking about how jargon is used to fit in with peers in the tech industry.
The user has been exploring the absurdity of using jargon to hide ignorance in conversations.
The user has been considering how to craft jokes about the disconnect between online personas and reality.
The user has expressed interest in crafting jokes about the quirks of their job and coworkers.
The user has shared that they enjoy making fun of the overuse of buzzwords in the tech industry.
The user has been experimenting with humor related to their daily life and experiences.
